title: Why Ghost Inspired This Mini CMS
excerpt: A short note about taking Ghost's publishing ideas and making them smaller for Lab 8.
content: Ghost is a publishing platform focused on posts, authors, newsletters, and clean editorial workflows. This mini app keeps the same domain but narrows it to posts, publishing status, tags, and summaries.
author: Amer Bidzevic

title: Patterns Added Deliberately
excerpt: The app uses Builder, Decorator, Facade, Command, Strategy, and Observer in small practical places.
content: The main goal is not to build a huge CMS. It is to show where design patterns reduce the exact problems found in the Ghost analysis: large creation methods, repeated wrappers, and hardcoded request behavior.
author: Amer Bidzevic
